title: quercus × paui
intro: Quercus × paui, also known as the Paui oak, is a rare and hybrid species of oak tree that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The Paui oak has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × paui include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
